task_completion.description: Blender application is open and active
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The file browser dialog for opening/importing an IFC file is accessed
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file browser window within Blender is open, indicating the agent is attempting to load a file.

task_completion.description: The correct IFC file is selected in the file browser
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file path '/home/ga/IFCModels/fzk_haus.ifc' or the file 'fzk_haus.ifc' is selected or typed in the Blender file browser.

task_completion.description: The IFC model structure is loaded into the Blender project
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender Outliner panel (usually top right) displays IFC elements, collections, or a project hierarchy, confirming the file has been loaded.

task_completion.description: The 3D building model is clearly visible in the viewport
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D model of a house/building (FZK-Haus) is rendered and clearly visible in the main 3D viewport of Blender.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blender GUI to open the file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Blender's menus, BlenderBIM panels, or file browser, rather than using a terminal script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The building is viewed as a 3D model in Blender, not an image
integrity.visual_evidence: Blender's 3D viewport elements (grid, axes, navigation gizmo, UI overlays) are visible around the building, proving it is not just an image opened in a viewer.

integrity.description: The agent opened the requested fzk_haus.ifc file
integrity.visual_evidence: The Outliner or file path history indicates 'fzk_haus' is the active project, ensuring a different pre-loaded model wasn't used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task explicitly requires opening the real FZK-Haus sample model (fzk_haus.ifc) located at /home/ga/IFCModels/fzk_haus.ifc using the BlenderBIM UI. The final state must show the 3D building model clearly visible in the Blender viewport.
